---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new calculation module, regional standard, or UI improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of what you want added.

## Feature Type

- [ ] New calculation module (e.g., lightning protection, arc flash)
- [ ] New region or sub-region (e.g., Singapore, South Africa)
- [ ] New standard edition update (e.g., updated NEC edition)
- [ ] UI / export improvement
- [ ] API improvement
- [ ] Other

## Problem / Motivation

What engineering problem does this feature solve? What are you currently unable to do?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like this feature to work. Include:
- Input parameters required
- Expected output
- Standard(s) to implement (with edition year)

## Standard Reference

List the specific standard(s) this feature should implement:

| Standard | Edition | Clause |
|----------|---------|--------|
| e.g. IEC 62305-2 | 2010 | Section 4 |

## Alternatives Considered

Have you found any workarounds? Are there similar tools or references that implement this?

## Additional Context

Any other context — regional authority requirements, project type, urgency, etc.
